summary: Iteration 34: Tested new features - Cover Letter Job URL Import, Resume Editor Improvements (sticky toolbar, full-width), PDF multi-page support, and Upload Error Handling with contact support options. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/cover-letter/fetch-job endpoint exists and accepts POST requests
POST /api/cover-letter/fetch-job returns expected response structure (job_title, company_name, job_description, source_url)
POST /api/resume/upload returns error for missing file
Cover Letter page loads with 'Import Job from URL' section visible
Helper text about auto-extraction from LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor visible
Resume Optimizer page loads correctly with upload section
Contact page exists with contact form and email link
Dio chatbot visible on pages for support

code_verification.sticky_toolbar: RichEditor.jsx line 262-263: sticky top-0 z-40 class and inline style position: 'sticky', top: 0
code_verification.full_width_editor: ResumePreview.jsx line 163: w-full h-full min-h-[700px] class
code_verification.error_handling: ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx lines 949-998: uploadError state with Contact Support link (data-testid='error-contact-link') and Chat with Dio button (data-testid='error-chatbot-btn')
code_verification.linkedin_url_handling: RichEditor.jsx lines 162-209: insertLink and removeLink functions with proper URL pre-fill and cleanup

critical_code_review_comments: CoverLetterPage.jsx: Job URL Import feature properly implemented with fetchingUrl state, handleFetchJobUrl function, and proper validation (lines 54-94)
cover_letter.py: fetch_job_from_url endpoint uses httpx for async HTTP requests and BeautifulSoup for HTML parsing (lines 15-102)
cover_letter.py: AI extraction uses Gemini model to parse job details from webpage content (lines 60-73)
RichEditor.jsx: Sticky toolbar implemented with both CSS class and inline style for cross-browser compatibility (lines 262-263)
RichEditor.jsx: Link handling improved with URL pre-fill for existing links and proper cleanup on removal (lines 162-209)
ResumePreview.jsx: Full-width editor wrapper with w-full h-full min-h-[700px] (line 163)
ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx: PDF pagebreak settings for multi-page support (line 820)
ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx: Upload error handling shows Contact Support link and Chat with Dio button (lines 949-998)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified all new features: 1) Cover Letter Job URL Import - POST /api/cover-letter/fetch-job endpoint works, UI has 'Import Job from URL' section with input field and Fetch button, 2) Resume Editor sticky toolbar - CSS sticky positioning verified in RichEditor.jsx, 3) Full-width editor - w-full class verified in ResumePreview.jsx, 4) PDF multi-page support - pagebreak settings verified in ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx, 5) Upload error handling - Contact Support link and Chat with Dio button implemented with proper data-testid attributes, 6) LinkedIn URL handling - insertLink and removeLink functions properly handle URL editing. All backend APIs tested and working. Contact page exists for support links.
